patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
 
 typedef enum {
     UART_OK       = 0,
-    UART_ERR_BUSY = 1,
-    UART_ERR_TIMEOUT = 2,
+    UART_ERR_TIMEOUT = 1,
+    UART_ERR_BUSY = 2,
     UART_ERR_PARITY  = 3
 } uart_status_t;
description: Swapped the numeric values of UART_ERR_BUSY and UART_ERR_TIMEOUT in the uart_status_t enum, breaking any caller that compares against these specific integer values.
